violations.description: Preventing contamination by employees. — --Employee observed handling ready-to-eat food * with bare hands. Employee was using bare hands to handle sandwiches, sandwich ingredients, and finished sandwiches. Need to use gloves, or utensils.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. Broken and missing counter top and cabinets by the glass door reach in cooler. Edge of the counter top by the door to the kitchen has no laminate and is bare wood.
Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. Hole in the wall by the three comp sink.
